name: hashicorp-vault
description: Full HashiCorp Vault management — KV secrets, PKI certificates, Transit encryption, auth methods, policies, and tokens via the Vault HTTP API

VAULT_TOKEN.description: Your Vault authentication token — generate one with 'vault token create' or use the root token for initial setup

VAULT_VERIFY_SSL.description: Set to 'true' to verify SSL certificates (default: false for self-signed certs)
